blocks.content: In this milestone, you configure instrumentation settings and enable telemetry capture for your selected service. Instrumentation Hub provides sensible defaults, but you can enable additional telemetry options if needed.
On the **Review Selection** page, confirm your selection and click **Continue**.
On the **Advanced Settings** page, review the telemetry options.

By default, you get:
- **R.E.D. Metrics** — Rate, Errors, and Duration
- **Service to Service links** — How services communicate

![Advanced instrumentation options](https://grafana.com/media/docs/grafana-cloud/instrumentation/app-addl-options.png)

Optionally, enable additional telemetry:

| Option | What it captures |
|--------|------------------|
| **Traces** | Distributed traces across services |
| **Application Logs** | Application logs for correlation |
| **Process Metrics** | Metrics about processes running the instrumented application |
| **Profiling** | Performance profiles for your service |
| **Extended Application Metrics** | Additional application metrics using OpenTelemetry semantic conventions |
> **Note:** Instrumentation can take up to 1.5 minutes depending on what you selected.
If prompted, click **Activate** to activate Application services.

After completion, you'll be taken to the **Manage** tab.

In the next milestone, you'll verify that telemetry data is flowing to Grafana Cloud.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Instrument application services](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/inst-hub-setup/#instrument-application-services)
- [Continuous profiling in Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-applications/profiles/)
